# third_party/omi-lisp

Pinned upstream reference snapshot for selective feature porting into `omnicron`.

Status:

- Read-only reference copy.
- No active development should happen in this subtree.
- Authoritative development trunk remains repository root (`omnicron`).

This snapshot is used for:

- parity fixtures for byte->header8->rewrite->emit behavior,
- semantic comparison while porting header8/dot runtime concepts,
- provenance/audit trail of imported ideas.

See [SNAPSHOT.md](/root/omnicron/third_party/omi-lisp/SNAPSHOT.md) for pinned source details.
